packageRules.description: Ignore pnpm workspace: protocol deps. Renovate skips them natively — rule kept for explicit intent.
peerDependencies are a compatibility contract with consumers, not an installed dep. Bumping them is a deliberate API decision tied to a plugin major.
Extra cooldown for majors
cargo: group minor/patch; majors stay individual
cargo: ungroup pre-1.0 minors — Cargo treats 0.x→0.y as breaking, so these need their own PR.
npm: group minor/patch; majors stay individual
npm: ungroup pre-1.0 minors — ^0.x.y resolves like ~0.x.y, so 0.x→0.y is breaking and needs its own PR.
github-actions: group everything, including majors

alloy + revm (incl. op-* variants): tightly coupled across the EVM execution stack — revm builds on alloy types, op-* carries the upstream crates transitively, perf-sensitive. Bundle into one PR; in practice we want them moving in lockstep even when only one side has a release.
rayon: pull out of the generic cargo minor/patch group — perf-sensitive, wants its own PR.
reqwest + middleware/retry/tracing: HTTP client on the RPC fork path. Lockstep across siblings, perf-sensitive on remote-block flows.
napi-rs: Rust crates and @napi-rs/cli are ABI-tied; must move in lockstep with edr_napi.
tokio family: keep async-surface versions in lockstep.
tracing family: keep span/event API consistent across crates.
External foundry-rs crates from crates.io (not the vendored fork in crates/foundry/). Released together upstream; may need lockstep with the vendored fork.
Node major: bumped manually, only to even LTS. Surfaces touched: .nvmrc, engines.node, @types/node, setup-node.
@tsconfig/nodeXX: Node major lives in the package name. Renovate emits these as 'replacement' updates; pair with the Node-major block above.
TS major: cascades to typescript-eslint and to consumers of EDR's TS-aware bindings. Bump manually when the ecosystem catches up.

crates/edr_napi/package.json is devDependencies-only — nothing ships to Hardhat consumers. Block test/lint majors (chai/mocha/eslint/prettier/...): review cost without downstream benefit. @napi-rs/cli is exempt — kept in the napi-rs ABI lockstep group above.
slang_solidity (tag-pinned) and revm-inspectors (Wodann fork at a fixed rev): bumped manually for compat. Matched on depName because for git deps the packageName is the URL.

Hardhat ecosystem (hardhat, hardhat2 alias, @nomicfoundation/hardhat-*): exact-pinned, pnpm-patched, partly on pre-release tracks. Bumps invalidate patches and break the v2/v3 benchmark setup; coordinated manually with edr↔hardhat releases.
